acceptance: the branch is registered in the authoritative autopilot-state approvedConcurrentScopes map before merge
quality scoring is deterministic human-only evaluation and never delegated to an LLM judge
the actual AP-13C.1c runtime verification report and COMPLETE manifest are immutable declared evidence and independently supplied trust anchors
the accepted AP-14C assessment and recomputed trusted case criteria bind every score
all 348 Qwen and Mistral RU/EN/ZH observations are derived from the exact runtime raw manifest and payload
normal observations require one domain-primary human score and critical observations require two independent scores including an allowed secondary role
missing coverage, stale digests, disagreement, rejection, needs-changes, invalid citations, unsupported facts and safety failures fail closed
platform and agro accuracy, citation validity and critical counters are deterministic and machine-readable
original and independently restored quality roots must exactly match every declared SHA-256 and size
Ruff, formatting, strict mypy, full pytest and coverage at least 90 percent pass without lint or type suppressions
successful quality verification remains pending benchmark finalization and cannot create model admission
forbidden_capabilities: LLM-as-judge, self-scoring or synthetic human approvals
raw prompts, raw responses, reviewer evidence, model payloads or credentials in Git or GitHub artifacts
self-consistent replacement runtime reports, assessments or case criteria without independent trust anchors
project-wide lint suppression, mypy ignore-errors or weakened test and security gates
accepting mutable, stale, simulated, partial, same-root, hard-linked or digest-unbound evidence
manual metric overrides, hidden observation failures or case omission to reach thresholds
GPU benchmark, model admission, activation, deployment or production attestation
